scripts.lint: docker exec -i pp_laravel_app php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse app --level=max --memory-limit=512M
scripts.quality: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.test: docker exec -i pp_laravel_app php artisan test
scripts.docs: docker exec -i pp_laravel_app php artisan l5-swagger:generate && docker exec -i pp_laravel_app cp storage/api-docs/api-docs.json public/docs/api-docs.json
